resources.string: Connect to Wi-Fi to start local device discovery and per-network memory.
Refine the current local Wi-Fi inventory the same way UNAGI lets you work the room.
Filter by IP, role, or service
MAKO only builds network inventory while connected to Wi-Fi.
Watching the current local Wi-Fi inventory.
Showing observed devices on the current local Wi-Fi network.
Showing observed devices while MAKO continues the current subnet sweep.
Connect to Wi-Fi to populate the local device inventory.
Connect to Wi-Fi to start local discovery.
Scanning this subnet now. Responsive devices will appear here as MAKO finds them.
No local devices match the current filters.
The last sweep failed before MAKO could build a device list.
Discovery stopped because the active network changed.
Sweep complete, but nothing on the current subnet answered yet.
MAKO starts local discovery once an active Wi-Fi link is available.
Per-network history appears here once MAKO has an active Wi-Fi record.
Local-only diagnostics. This report clearly includes sensitive values such as local IPs, gateway IPs, DNS servers, and discovered host addresses.
